"import json

path = "/Users/pravinsam/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/353b6a43-7fa1-4a16-b18d-9ef0cd6ad7d2/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        step_idx = data.get("step_index")
        if step_idx in (71, 79):
            print(f"Dumping step {step_idx}")
            with open(f"step_{step_idx}.json", "w") as out_f:
                json.dump(data, out_f, indent=2)
"
Description: "Dump steps 71 and 79 to find dining.html end lines"
